title: Fix snapshot detail hero layout
summary: Reworked the snapshot detail hero so the checkout action belongs to the metadata band instead of floating in a detached side column, added mobile ordering that surfaces the action before secondary metadata, and fixed the platform overview artifact count reference that blocked the UI build.
userVisibleChange: Snapshot detail pages now have a cleaner, responsive hero: summary text stays readable, metadata wraps without awkward truncation, and the checkout button is visible and full-width on mobile.

timeline.title: Verified desktop and mobile renderings with Playwright

decisions.title: Keep the detail hero restrained and content-led for developers and product people reviewing product history.
Use content-wrapping metadata instead of equal grid columns so dates, author, and snapshot IDs do not truncate unnecessarily.

validation.command: Playwright desktop and mobile screenshots for /snapshots/snap_080e0ffc02e9de0a plus 390px overflow/touch-size check
